name: Word Fortress
description: Master the art of spelling through challenges and fill-in-the-blank quests.
storyIntro: The ancient Word Fortress holds the kingdom's lexicon — every word ever written is carved into its walls. But the carvings have begun to fade, and only a scholar who can tell true spellings from false ones can restore them.

name: Context Courtyard
description: Learn to wield vocabulary with precision and context.
storyIntro: In the courtyard, scholars debate the meaning of words. Each word is a tool — but only the right word in the right place can unlock the courtyard's hidden passages.

name: Story Tower
description: Climb the tower of fiction and unlock the secrets within each story.
storyIntro: Each floor of the tower contains a tale waiting to be understood. Read carefully — the characters will reveal their secrets only to those who pay attention to the details.

name: Knowledge Keep
description: Explore the keep's vast library of nonfiction and answer its riddles.
storyIntro: The keep's shelves contain the sum of human knowledge — history, science, and discovery. But the librarian tests all who enter. Only those who can read between the lines will pass.

name: Champion's Arena
description: Prove your mastery with mixed challenges from every kingdom.
storyIntro: Only those who have trained in all four kingdoms may enter the arena. Here, every skill is tested. The arena adapts to your weaknesses — conquer them, and the crown is yours.
